maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Urban
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Urban
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Urban'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Urban
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - branch authorisation) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Urban
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Urban'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Urban
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Urban' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Urban
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Urban'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Have placed before the General
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Have placed before the General'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: (e) The accounts of the federation should have been audited and placed
before the General Body within six months of the closing of the
accounting period.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Have placed before the General
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to have been audited and placed before the general body within six months of the closing of the accounting period. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Have placed before the General
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Have placed before the General'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Have placed before the General
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Have placed before the General' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Have placed before the General
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Have placed before the General'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Contact with a request letter'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: A new UCB seeking reporting
access to CISBI, should contact the Reserve Bank with a request letter providing
details of the bank's nodal person, an email ID for receiving the login credentials and
cer

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Contact with a request letter
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to contact the reserve bank with a request letter providing details of the bank's nodal person, an email id for receiving the login credentials and certa. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Contact with a request letter
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Contact with a request letter'. Required evidence types: System Access/Audit Logs. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: System Access/Audit Logs
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Contact with a request letter
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Contact with a request letter' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Log Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Contact with a request letter
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Contact with a request letter'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.title: MAP: Fill pertaining to the bank
maps.objective: To ensure fill all other information pertaining to the bank and submit on the cisbi portal

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Fill pertaining to the bank
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Fill pertaining to the bank'. Document the existing Reporting posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: Bank should fill all other information pertaining to the bank and submit on the CISBI
portal.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Fill pertaining to the bank
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Fill pertaining to the bank'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Fill pertaining to the bank
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Fill pertaining to the bank'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Fill pertaining to the bank
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Fill pertaining to the bank'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Fill pertaining to the bank
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Fill pertaining to the bank'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

maps.objective: To ensure generate 'nil report' for position as on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on cisbi

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Generate position as on last
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Generate position as on last'. Document the existing Access Control posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: In the last week of every month, banks shall generate 'NIL Report' for position as
on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on CISBI.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Generate position as on last
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement technical controls to configure system to generate 'nil report' for position as on last day of previous month, authenticate it and submit on cisbi. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Configure system parameters: Generate position as on last
tasks.description: Apply specific configuration parameters for 'Generate position as on last'. Refer to applicable vendor documentation or Group Policy / Registry / OS settings for the exact parameter names and values required. Validate changes do not conflict with existing business configurations. Document pre-change and post-change configuration states.
tasks.expected_evidence: PowerShell output, Registry export, or system configuration dump
tasks.implementation_notes: Ensure rollback script is prepared prior to making changes.

tasks.title: Test and validate implementation: Generate position as on last
tasks.description: Execute functional and compliance testing to confirm that 'Generate position as on last' has been implemented correctly. Tests must cover positive scenarios (compliant behaviour is accepted) and negative scenarios (non-compliant behaviour is rejected). Record all test cases, inputs, outputs, and pass/fail results in a Test Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Test report PDF with test case results and system output evidence
tasks.implementation_notes: All tests must pass before proceeding to the next task.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Generate position as on last
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Generate position as on last'. Required evidence types: System Configuration Screenshot. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: System Configuration Screenshot
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Generate position as on last' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Configuration Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.

tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.
